def positive_numpy_tolist_in_hot_path():
    rule_id = "numpy_tolist_in_hot_path"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "NumPy arrays are converted to Python lists in hot paths, increasing object overhead."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
